## Summary
- PR title format: `<area>: <short present-tense summary>`
- What changed:
- Why:

## Validation
- [ ] TypeScript format, lint, and typecheck completed (see `docs/CHECKS.md`)
- [ ] Relevant tests run (see `docs/TESTING.md`)
- [ ] Build completed if app code changed (see `docs/CHECKS.md`)
- [ ] Manual upload or query checks completed when relevant (see `docs/CHECKS.md`)

## Docs
- [ ] Relevant docs under `docs/` updated (or not needed)
- [ ] `docs/exec-plans/` updated if scope or decisions changed
- [ ] Architecture docs updated if package boundaries or invariants changed

## Risk
- Risks:
- Rollback plan:
